series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of corrections made to employee payroll.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in operating system until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
